articles.title: UK's hottest May day record broken for second day in a row
articles.description: Temperatures soared to 35.1C in Kew Gardens, south-west London, according to provisional figures.

articles.title: Body found in search for boy, 12, missing in river
articles.description: Police and fire crews with underwater units launched a major search until a body was recovered on Tuesday night.

articles.title: Labour has 'no coherent plan' for country, says Blair
articles.description: The ex-Labour PM says Sir Keir Starmer's government is in the "wrong position" ahead of the next election.

articles.title: Nasa unveils next steps to build permanent Moon base
articles.description: Nasa plans to send hopping drones and roving vehicles to the Moon as part of plans for a permanent Moon base.
